avg_tps.source: Derived: ~102B annual / 31,557,600 seconds. Digital subscription segment revised up from 10B to 15B based on streaming platform enumeration. Telecoms +2B from GSMA 5.8B unique subs. See workings/confidence-uplift-run10.md.
avg_tps.note: Range: 2,800-3,800 TPS. Hard data anchors: US ACH 17.17B, EU SEPA DD 22.7B, UK BACS DD 5.0B, India BBPS 3.0B annualized, GSMA mobile money $99B bill payments.

peak_tps.source: Estimated: month-start direct debit processing at ~2x average
peak_tps.note: Bill payments cluster heavily around 1st/15th of month

annual_volume.source: Revised bottom-up: utilities 43B, telecoms 37B (+2B from GSMA 5.8B unique subs), digital subscriptions 15B (+5B from streaming enumeration: Netflix 302M, Spotify 276M, etc.), rent 7B. Hard data anchors: US ACH 17.17B, EU SEPA DD 22.7B, UK BACS DD 5.0B, India BBPS 3.0B annualized, GSMA mobile money $99B in bill payments. See workings/confidence-uplift-run10.md.
annual_volume.note: Range: 87-118B. Central 102B. Digital subscription uplift driven by top-9 streaming enumeration (962M billing accounts x 12 = 11.5B) + gaming/SaaS subs (~3.5B). Excludes insurance premiums.

annual_value_usd.source: Derived: segment volumes × average payment amounts

utilities_electricity.source: IEA electricity access + household size estimate

telecoms_mobile.source: GSMA Mobile Economy 2026: 5.8B unique subscribers (8.8B connections); includes postpaid bills + prepaid top-ups
telecoms_mobile.note: 20B = ~2.6B postpaid × 12 months + ~3.2B active prepaid × ~2 top-ups/month. GSMA also reports $99B in mobile money bill payments globally in 2025.

digital_subscriptions.note: Top 9 streaming: Netflix 302M, Spotify 276M, Amazon Prime 200M+, Disney+ 125M, YouTube Premium 100M+, HBO Max 100M, Paramount+ 72M, Apple TV+ 40M, Peacock 36M = ~962M billing accounts (adj for household sharing). Plus gaming subs (Xbox Game Pass 40M, PS Plus 50M), cloud storage (iCloud 100M, Google One 100M), SaaS 285M. Adjusted for 20% annual billing.
digital_subscriptions.source: Individual service Q1-Q2 2025 SEC filings and company disclosures

rent_payments.note: Highly uncertain. Digital rent payment penetration estimated at ~40% globally; cash rent is untracked.

historic.source: Modeled; SEPA DD + NACHA + BBPS data points

overlap.overlap_note: ~90% of bill payments flow through direct debit (bank transfers), card-on-file (consumer cards), or mobile money/wallet rails already counted in other capsules. Only cash/check bill payments (~10%) are incremental. Insurance premiums excluded (separate capsule).

sources.citation: NACHA — ACH Network Volume and Value Statistics 2024
BACS Payment Schemes — Annual Report 2024 (UK Direct Debit)
European Central Bank — Payment Statistics (SEPA Direct Debit)
NPCI — Bharat Bill Payment System (BBPS) Statistics FY2024
GSMA — The State of Mobile Internet Connectivity Report 2024
ITU — Facts and Figures: Focus on Connectivity 2024
US Census Bureau — Quarterly Residential Vacancies Q4 2024
GSMA — State of the Industry Report on Mobile Money 2026
SQ Magazine — Digital Platform Subscription Statistics 2026

confidence.notes: Run 10 uplift: GSMA Mobile Economy 2026 — 5.8B unique mobile subs (up from 5.5B). GSMA mobile money $99B in bill payments (first segment-specific value figure for emerging markets). Streaming subscriber enumeration: top 9 platforms = 962M billing accounts = 11.5B annual events (Netflix 302M, Spotify 276M, etc.) — digital subscription segment revised from 10B to 15B. India BBPS Q1 FY26: 750M/quarter = 3B annualized (73% CAGR confirmed). Total revised from 97B to 102B.
